response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song title 'HIT ME UP' from the on-screen text. 2. Performed a web search for 'HIT ME UP hololive lyrics' to identify the original artist. 3. Confirmed the original song is 'HIT ME UP' by Kira (feat. Monii & Gumi) and retrieved the full lyrics. 4. Segmented the video into the performance (00:00-02:30), transition (02:30-02:36), and talk (02:36-04:59). 5. Mapped the metadata and lyrics to the appropriate scene in the JSON schema.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song 'HIT ME UP' by the VTubers Calliope Mori, Hakos Baelz, and IRyS, followed by a talk segment where they introduce themselves.

scenes.description: Calliope Mori, Hakos Baelz, and IRyS perform the song 'HIT ME UP'. The stage features dynamic lighting and digital background graphics.
